author: Safia Sultana (@AIwithSafia)
post_text: @TencentAI_News entered the AI agent race with WorkBuddy. The post frames WorkBuddy as an AI-native productivity agent that executes work such as file analysis, presentations, and research.
why_candidate: 今天熱門分頁可見；以大型公司新產品切入，Hook 是「不是另一個 chatbot」，具備 AI agent 產品發布與工作自動化話題性。

author: Kshitij Mishra | AI & Tech (@DAIEvolutionHub)
post_text: MICROSOFT JUST CHANGED AI AGENTS FOREVER. The post says Microsoft open-sourced SkillOpt, a system for agent skills to improve automatically over time without constant prompt tweaking or manual testing.
why_candidate: 強情緒標題搭配 Microsoft 與 open-source 關鍵字，觀看數高於同頁多數貼文，適合分析 FOMO 型 AI agent Hook。

author: Geek Lite (@QingQ77)
post_text: 從工程視角拆解 Pi Agent 核心原理，帶你用 TypeScript 從零實作一個教學版 AI Agent，連到 GitHub 專案 how-pi-agent-works。
why_candidate: 技術實作型內容，書籤數 61 高於喜歡數，顯示保存價值強，適合拆解「從零實作」型內容結構。

author: Safia Sultana (@AIwithSafia)
post_text: @TencentAI_News entered the AI agent race with WorkBuddy. Similar framing: WorkBuddy is an AI-native productivity agent for actual work execution across files, presentations, and research.
why_candidate: 同題材的另一則公開貼文，互動較低但留言比例高，可與同作者高互動版本比較 Hook 或素材差異。

author: Flap Ecosystem (@flap_ch)
post_text: BNBRouter is positioned as a decentralized AI API router on BNBCHAIN with API aggregation, on-chain payment, and native agent support through x402 and Hermes.
why_candidate: 互動與觀看數明顯較高，結合 Web3、AI API router、agent support，多層技術敘事可分析趨勢交會點。

author: Pond (@JoinPond)
post_text: Pond introduces ECC Tools: a developer tool that analyzes repos, generates AI coding agent configs, automates PRs, and runs security scans.
why_candidate: 時間新、與 AI coding agent workflow 直接相關；Hook 用 200K GitHub stars 與 50% MRR growth 做可信度背書。

author: Shushant Lakhyani (@shushant_l)
post_text: Everyone is talking about AI agents. Almost nobody has built one. The post promises a from-scratch path for building a personal AI agent with a folder-style structure.
why_candidate: 開頭直接製造落差：「大家都在談，但幾乎沒人做過」，再承諾從零打造，屬於高可模仿教學型 Hook。

author: smrati tiwari (@smratitiwa86867)
post_text: Best GitHub repos for building AI agents in 2026, including LangChain and CrewAI, framed as a curated repository list for AI agent builders.
why_candidate: 清單型內容，主題明確且可收藏，適合拆解「最佳 GitHub repos」資源整理模板。

author: GitHubDaily (@GitHub_Daily)
post_text: 介紹 Pentest Agent Suite，一套為 AI coding tools 打造的自動化漏洞挖掘框架，內建 50 個漏洞型智能體並覆蓋 19 類漏洞。
why_candidate: 安全測試與 AI coding agent 結合，留言數等於喜歡數，顯示議題可能引發討論或追問。

author: Anderson (@0x7_anderson)
post_text: Discusses ERC-8257 as an on-chain AI Agent Tool App Store standard, tied to OpenSea, Ethereum Foundation, and related crypto project positioning.
why_candidate: 把 AI agent 與 on-chain tool/app store 標準連結，雖互動不高但題材獨特，可作為 Web3 agent 趨勢候選。
